name: bloblet
desc: round teal-cyan blob monster with big happy eyes and a singing open mouth, smooth glossy jelly body

name: spikelet
desc: small round magenta-pink monster covered in soft star spikes, cheeky grin

name: fuzzle
desc: fluffy round orange furry monster, fuzzy fur sticking out, warm smile

name: glimmer
desc: ice-blue crystal gem monster, faceted translucent diamond body, gentle glowing smile
